title: Enrich BFS data with I14Y codelists
text: new I14Y data model, level former multi-level nomenclature published separate codelist concept. NOGA, means four concepts: NOGA_SECTION, NOGA_DIVISION, NOGA_GROUP, NOGA_CLASS. Search : Pick one matching granularity data. “Wirtschaftsabteilung” (economic division) want DV_NOGA_DIVISION.
code: i14y_search_concept(query = "NOGA", language = "en", pageSize = 10) #> # A tibble: 10 × 61 #>    businessEvents conceptType formats    id                identifier lifeEvents #>    <list>         <chr>       <list>     <chr>             <chr>      <list>     #>  1 <list [0]>     CodeList    <list [0]> 08dc481b-2add-12… nogaCode   <list [0]> #>  2 <list [0]>     CodeList    <list [0]> 001bfaa8-fa57-4d… nogaCode   <list [0]> #>  3 <list [0]>     CodeList    <list [0]> 08d94603-f490-f0… NOGA_SECT… <list [0]> #>  4 <list [0]>     CodeList    <list [0]> 08d94604-db03-19… NOGA_CLASS <list [0]> #>  5 <list [0]>     CodeList    <list [0]> 08d94604-e058-62… NOGA_DIVI… <list [0]> #>  6 <list [0]>     CodeList    <list [0]> 08d94604-e5ac-f8… NOGA_GROUP <list [0]> #>  7 <list [0]>     CodeList    <list [0]> 08d94604-f12a-5d… NOGA_TYPE  <list [0]> #>  8 <list [0]>     CodeList    <list [0]> 08d9f1f9-3f89-00… NOGA_SECT… <list [0]> #>  9 <list [0]>     CodeList    <list [0]> 08d94604-ecc0-66… NOGA_OFS50 <list [0]> #> 10 <list [0]>     CodeList    <list [0]> 08dd28d2-a693-50… nogaCode   <list [0]> #> # ℹ 55 more variables: publicationLevel <chr>, registrationStatus <chr>, #> #   themes <list>, type <chr>, validFrom <chr>, version <chr>, validTo <chr>, #> #   description.de <chr>, description.en <chr>, description.fr <chr>, #> #   description.it <chr>, publisher.homePage <chr>, publisher.id <chr>, #> #   publisher.identifier <chr>, publisher.images <list>, #> #   publisher.spatial <list>, publisher.spatialCH <list>, #> #   publisher.subAgents <list>, publisher.uid <chr>, …

title: Enrich BFS data with I14Y codelists
text: tibble carries one column per official language (Name_de, Name_fr, Name_it, Name_en) ready joining.
code: noga_division <- i14y_get_codelist(   id = "08d94604-e058-62a2-aa25-53f84b974201" # DV_NOGA_DIVISION ) |>   mutate(Code = as.numeric(Code))  noga_division #> # A tibble: 88 × 12 #>     Code ParentCode Name_de       Name_fr Name_it Name_rm Name_en Description_de #>    <dbl> <lgl>      <chr>         <chr>   <chr>   <lgl>   <chr>   <lgl>          #>  1     1 NA         Landwirtscha… Cultur… Produz… NA      Crop a… NA             #>  2     2 NA         Forstwirtsch… Sylvic… Silvic… NA      Forest… NA             #>  3     3 NA         Fischerei un… Pêche … Pesca … NA      Fishin… NA             #>  4     5 NA         Kohlenbergbau Extrac… Estraz… NA      Mining… NA             #>  5     6 NA         Gewinnung vo… Extrac… Estraz… NA      Extrac… NA             #>  6     7 NA         Erzbergbau    Extrac… Estraz… NA      Mining… NA             #>  7     8 NA         Gewinnung vo… Autres… Altre … NA      Other … NA             #>  8     9 NA         Erbringung v… Servic… Attivi… NA      Mining… NA             #>  9    10 NA         Herstellung … Indust… Indust… NA      Manufa… NA             #> 10    11 NA         Getränkehers… Fabric… Produz… NA      Manufa… NA             #> # ℹ 78 more rows #> # ℹ 4 more variables: Description_fr <lgl>, Description_it <lgl>, #> #   Description_rm <lgl>, Description_en <lgl>

title: Enrich BFS data with I14Y codelists
text: Get monthly income gender economic division 2022: Extract NOGA code German label left-join multilingual codelist:
code: income_meta <- BFS::bfs_get_metadata(number_bfs = "px-x-0304010000_201")  income <- BFS::bfs_get_data(   number_bfs = "px-x-0304010000_201",   language = "de",   query = list(     Jahr = "2022",     Geschlecht = c("1", "2"),     Wirtschaftsabteilung = income_meta$values[[3]],     "Zentralwert und andere Perzentile" = "1"   ) ) income |>   filter(!str_detect(Wirtschaftsabteilung, "Sektor")) |>   mutate(Code = readr::parse_number(Wirtschaftsabteilung)) |>   left_join(noga_division, by = "Code") |>   select(Wirtschaftsabteilung, Name_en, Name_fr, Name_it) |>   arrange(Name_en) |>   head(10) #> Warning: There was 1 warning in `mutate()`. #> ℹ In argument: `Code = readr::parse_number(Wirtschaftsabteilung)`. #> Caused by warning: #> ! title: Enrich BFS data with I14Y codelists
text: need entries, search within codelist concept instead downloading whole. faceted endpoint accepts free-text query five languages: ’d rather get search result downloadable CSV:
code: i14y_search_codelist(   id = "08d94604-e058-62a2-aa25-53f84b974201", # NOGA_DIVISION   query = "agriculture",   language = "fr" ) #> # A tibble: 2 × 8 #>   annotations  code  conceptId             id    name.de name.en name.fr name.it #>   <list>       <chr> <chr>                 <chr> <chr>   <chr>   <chr>   <chr>   #> 1 <df [2 × 8]> 02    08d94604-e058-62a2-a… 411e… Forstw… Forest… Sylvic… Silvic… #> 2 <df [2 × 8]> 01    08d94604-e058-62a2-a… 056e… Landwi… Crop a… Cultur… Produz… i14y_export_codelist_search(   id = "08d94604-e058-62a2-aa25-53f84b974201",   query = "agriculture",   language = "fr",   format = "csv" ) #> # A tibble: 2 × 30 #>   Code  ParentCode Name_de        Name_fr Name_it Name_rm Name_en Description_de #>   <chr> <lgl>      <chr>          <chr>   <chr>   <lgl>   <chr>   <lgl>          #> 1 02    NA         Forstwirtscha… Sylvic… Silvic… NA      Forest… NA             #> 2 01    NA         Landwirtschaf… Cultur… Produz… NA      Crop a… NA             #> # ℹ 22 more variables: Description_fr <lgl>, Description_it <lgl>, #> #   Description_rm <lgl>, Description_en <lgl>, Annotation_ABBREV_Type <chr>, #> #   Annotation_ABBREV_Title <lgl>, Annotation_ABBREV_URI <lgl>, #> #   Annotation_ABBREV_Identifier <lgl>, Annotation_ABBREV_Text_de <chr>, #> #   Annotation_ABBREV_Text_fr <chr>, Annotation_ABBREV_Text_it <chr>, #> #   Annotation_ABBREV_Text_rm <lgl>, Annotation_ABBREV_Text_en <chr>, #> #   Annotation_INCLUDES_Type <chr>, Annotation_INCLUDES_Title <lgl>, …

title: Enrich BFS data with I14Y codelists
text: full concept descriptor — including version, publisher, registration status, value type, conformance statements — available via i14y_get_concept(): Pass includeCodeListEntries = TRUE want entries embedded response (rarely needed already i14y_get_codelist()). need full canonical JSON export concept (useful archiving feeding concept another system), use i14y_get_concept_export():
code: concept <- i14y_get_concept(   id = "08d94604-e058-62a2-aa25-53f84b974201",   includeCodeListEntries = FALSE )  concept$publisher #> $classification #> $classification$code #> [1] "0220" #>  #> $classification$name #> $classification$name$de #> [1] "Verwaltungseinheit des Bundes" #>  #> $classification$name$en #> [1] "Administrative unit of the Confederation" #>  #> $classification$name$fr #> [1] "Unité de l’administration fédérale" #>  #> $classification$name$it #> [1] "Unità amministrativa della Confederazione" #>  #>  #>  #> $description #> $description$de #> [1] "Das BFS ist das nationale Kompetenzzentrum der öffentlichen Statistik der Schweiz. Es produziert und publiziert statistische Informationen über den Stand und die Entwicklung von Bevölkerung, Wirtschaft, Gesellschaft, Bildung, Forschung, Raum und Umwelt. Diese Informationen dienen der Meinungsbildung in der Bevölkerung sowie der Planung und Steuerung von zentralen Politikbereichen. Sie leisten einen wichtigen Beitrag für einen modernen, demokratischen Staat." #>  #> $description$en #> [1] "The FSO is Switzerland's national competence centre for official statistics. It produces and publishes statistical information on the status and development of the population, economy, society, education, research, territory and the environment. This information is used for opinion building among the population and for the planning and management of key policy areas. They make an important contribution to a modern, democratic state." #>  #> $description$fr #> [1] "L'OFS est le centre de compétence de la statistique publique suisse. Il produit des informations statistiques sur la population, l'économie, la société, la formation et la recherche, le territoire et l'environnement. Ces informations servent à la formation de l’opinion publique. Elles sont un outil de planification et de gouvernance dans tous les domaines de l’action politique et contribuent au bon fonctionnement de notre État moderne et démocratique." #>  #> $description$it #> [1] "L’UST è il centro di competenza nazionale per la statistica pubblica della Svizzera. Produce e pubblica informazioni statistiche sullo stato e sull'evoluzione della popolazione, dell'economia, della società, della formazione, della ricerca, del territorio e dell'ambiente. Queste informazioni servono alla formazione dell'opinione pubblica nonché alla pianificazione e alla gestione in ambiti politici di centrale importanza. Forniscono un importante contributo per uno Stato moderno e democratico." #>  #> $description$rm #> [1] "" #>  #>  #> $homePage #> [1] "https://bfs.admin.ch" #>  #> $id #> [1] "a88d610b-62f9-4e45-b288-3b23ff4f1758" #>  #> $identifier #> [1] "CH1" #>  #> $images #> list() #>  #> $name #> $name$de #> [1] "Bundesamt für Statistik (BFS)" #>  #> $name$en #> [1] "Federal Statistical Office (FSO)" #>  #> $name$fr #> [1] "Office Fédéral de la Statistique (OFS)" #>  #> $name$it #> [1] "Ufficio federale di statistica (UFS)" #>  #> $name$rm #> [1] "" #>  #>  #> $prefLabel #> $prefLabel$de #> [1] "BFS" #>  #> $prefLabel$en #> [1] "FSO" #>  #> $prefLabel$fr #> [1] "OFS" #>  #> $prefLabel$it #> [1] "UFS" #>  #> $prefLabel$rm #> [1] "" #>  #>  #> $system #> $system$createdAt #> [1] "0001-01-01T00:00:00+00:00" #>  #> $system$modifiedAt #> [1] "2026-07-10T07:18:44.32979+00:00" #>  #>  #> $spatial #> [1] "CH" #>  #> $spatialCH #>   code name.de     name.en name.fr  name.it name.rm #> 1 8100 Schweiz Switzerland  Suisse Svizzera  Svizra #>  #> $subAgents #> list() #>  #> $uid #> [1] "CHE131608474" concept$registrationStatus #> [1] "PreferredStandard" concept$description$en #> [1] "Second level of the General Classification of Economic Activities (NOGA) composed of headings identified by a two-digit numerical code. This second level is determined by the International Standard Industrial Classification of All Economic Activities (ISIC Rev.4)." concept_export <- i14y_get_concept_export(   id = "08d94604-e058-62a2-aa25-53f84b974201" ) str(concept_export, max.level = 1) #> List of 1 #>  $ data:List of 20

what: Faceted search across all resource types
title: Discovering the I14Y catalog
text: i14y_search() covers everything: datasets, data services, public services, concepts, mapping tables. Filter resource type: Filter publisher theme — values come I14Y vocabularies (visible search result’s publisher.identifier / themes fields). example, Federal Statistical Office publisher identifier CH1, theme code 115 “Economy”: Restrict datasets actually published structure:

title: Discovering the I14Y catalog
text: list endpoint matching get function: resource type get function: Mapping tables expose full metadata (source/target codelists, publisher, version, …) via i14y_get_mappingtable(): actual code--code relations mapping table (source/target/relation-type triples) exported i14y_get_mappingtable_relations(). default format = "Json" returns tidy data.frame; format = "Csv" returns raw CSV character string.
code: dataset <- i14y_get_dataset(id = "b902add5-9538-47ed-b663-f9fbfac92381") dataset$title$en #> [1] "Set di dati SpiGes (file di dati)" dataset$registrationStatus #> [1] "Recorded" ds_id <- i14y_list_dataservices()$id[1] dataservice <- i14y_get_dataservice(id = ds_id) dataservice$title$en #> [1] "Pension API (OpenPension)"  ps_id <- i14y_list_publicservices()$id[1] publicservice <- i14y_get_publicservice(id = ps_id) publicservice$title$en #> NULL mt_id <- i14y_list_mappingtables()$id[1] mt <- i14y_get_mappingtable(id = mt_id) mt$name$en #> [1] "Mapping Geo Focus to ISO 3166-1 Alpha-2" mt$source$uri #> [1] "https://register.ld.admin.ch/i14y/concept/geo-focus/version/1.0.0" mt$target$uri #> [1] "https://register.ld.admin.ch/i14y/concept/iso-3166-1-alpha2/version/1.0.0" relations <- i14y_get_mappingtable_relations(id = mt_id) head(relations) #> # A tibble: 0 × 0

title: Discovering the I14Y catalog
text: Resources I14Y belong one catalogs (typically one per federal office cantonal organization). List : single catalog, can fetch metadata download whole catalog DCAT/RDF DCAT/TTL document: TTL/RDF export canonical format harvesting I14Y metadata systems (CKAN, opendata.swiss, custom triple-stores). catalog also exposes individual records (one per resource listed catalog) via i14y_get_catalog_records(). every catalog records — many federal catalogs currently empty — pick one , example NL Opendata.swiss catalog: record points underlying resource (dataset, data service, …) primaryTopic.resourceId primaryTopic.resourceType, can fetch matching i14y_get_*() function: single-record endpoint i14y_get_catalog_record(id, recordId) exists currently requires authentication public API (HTTP 401 anonymous callers), don’t show live call .
code: catalogs <- i14y_list_catalogs() head(catalogs[, c("id", "title.en")], 5) #> # A tibble: 5 × 2 #>   id                                   title.en                                  #>   <chr>                                <chr>                                     #> 1 8ec39bcd-9f7c-4dd5-b0c9-ce69e2aafb39 Federal Office of Topography swisstopo O… #> 2 b1d443a5-535d-4b1d-92d3-9244091a63ca eHealth Suisse Opendata.swiss             #> 3 cc98af80-593a-41a5-93e7-99ed454721f0 Federal Tax Administration AFC Opendata.… #> 4 32c0a9c1-df9f-4426-8c48-8a2ea2410f34 Federal Office of Justice FOJ Opendata.s… #> 5 950e523a-8f5c-42dc-b512-6d2e402e4ab0 NL Opendata.swiss catalog_id <- catalogs$id[1]  catalog <- i14y_get_catalog(id = catalog_id) catalog$title$en #> [1] "Federal Office of Topography swisstopo Opendata.swiss"  dcat_ttl <- i14y_get_catalog_dcat(id = catalog_id, format = "TTL") cat(substr(dcat_ttl, 1, 500)) #> @base <https://i14y.admin.ch/resources/dcat/catalogs/8ec39bcd-9f7c-4dd5-b0c9-ce69e2aafb39>. #>  #> @prefix rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>. #> @prefix rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>. #> @prefix xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>. #> @prefix dcat: <http://www.w3.org/ns/dcat#>. #> @prefix vcard: <http://www.w3.org/2006/vcard/ns#>. #> @prefix dct: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>. #> @prefix foaf: <http://xmlns.com/foaf/0.1/>. #> @prefix spdx: <http://spdx.org/rdf/terms#>. #> @prefix dcatap: < records_catalog_id <- catalogs$id[catalogs$title.en == "NL Opendata.swiss"][1] records <- i14y_get_catalog_records(id = records_catalog_id) str(records, max.level = 1) #> tibble [14 × 5] (S3: tbl_df/tbl/data.frame) records[, c("id", "primaryTopic.resourceId", "primaryTopic.resourceType")] |>   head(3) #> # A tibble: 3 × 3 #>   id                               primaryTopic.resourc…¹ primaryTopic.resourc…² #>   <chr>                            <chr>                  <chr>                  #> 1 0c352cf6-b3c9-478e-8b32-f89d9b3… 0699e542-e6f0-4038-be… Dataset                #> 2 1c7a458c-1d8d-449c-8d6b-bb06df9… 21d9c29e-7a21-4deb-97… Dataset                #> 3 2c03f216-f40d-41be-95b7-c9461b8… 96857d76-0ddc-4721-99… Dataset                #> # ℹ abbreviated names: ¹​primaryTopic.resourceId, ²​primaryTopic.resourceType

title: Getting started with I14Y
text: workflows follow three steps: Search resource, either faceted i14y_search() one convenience wrappers (i14y_search_catalog(), i14y_search_concept()). Inspect metadata single item i14y_get_*(). Download actual payload (codelist entries, dataset structure, DCAT export, …) matching i14y_get_*() / i14y_export_*() function.

title: Getting started with I14Y

title: Getting started with I14Y
text: Pick id search result fetch full metadata: Multilingual fields always carry four official Swiss languages plus Romansh (de, fr, , en, rm available).
code: concept <- i14y_get_concept(id = "08d94604-e058-62a2-aa25-53f84b974201") concept$name #> $de #> [1] "NOGA Abteilung" #>  #> $en #> [1] "NOGA Division" #>  #> $fr #> [1] "NOGA Division" #>  #> $it #> [1] "NOGA Divisione" concept$description$en #> [1] "Second level of the General Classification of Economic Activities (NOGA) composed of headings identified by a two-digit numerical code. This second level is determined by the International Standard Industrial Classification of All Economic Activities (ISIC Rev.4)."

title: Getting started with I14Y
text: Two vignettes drill common workflows: vignette("codelists--bfs") — translate official BFS dataset codes multilingual labels. vignette("discovering--catalog") — list filter resources type, publisher, theme, …; export catalog metadata DCAT.

what: Search and Get Data from the I14Y Interoperability Platform of Switzerland
title: Search and Get Data from the I14Y Interoperability Platform of Switzerland
text: Search download official Swiss metadata I14Y interoperability platform Switzerland using public IOP API Console API four official languages plus English (“de”, “fr”, “”, “en”, “rm”). platform publishes metadata five kinds resources — Concepts (definitions codelists), Datasets, DataServices, PublicServices MappingTables — organised Catalogs. package mirrors structure one family functions per resource type.

title: Search and Get Data from the I14Y Interoperability Platform of Switzerland
text: Three vignettes give end--end view package can : Getting started I14Y — three-step search → inspect → download workflow, one example per resource type. Discovering I14Y catalog — faceted search vs. list endpoints, getting dataservices / publicservices / mapping tables, browsing catalogs exporting DCAT. Enrich BFS data I14Y codelists — canonical use case: find codelist, download , join onto BFS dataset get multilingual labels.

title: Search and Get Data from the I14Y Interoperability Platform of Switzerland
text: Function arguments use camelCase (pageSize, publicationLevel, registrationStatuses, withAnnotations, …) rather idiomatic R snake_case. deliberate: argument names match underlying OpenAPI parameters one--one, anything read I14Y API documentation can passed straight corresponding R function.

title: Search and Get Data from the I14Y Interoperability Platform of Switzerland
text: default package targets https://api.i14y.admin.ch/api/public/v1. Override I14Y_BASE_URL environment variable point different deployment (test environment, local mock):
code: Sys.setenv(I14Y_BASE_URL = "https://api-test.i14y.admin.ch/api/public/v1")

title: Search and Get Data from the I14Y Interoperability Platform of Switzerland
text: R package inspired fso-metadata I14Y Python tutorials.

what: Export search results from a codelist concept — i14y_export_codelist_search
title: Export search results from a codelist concept — i14y_export_codelist_search
text: Calls I14Y public API endpoint /concepts/{conceptId}/codelist-entries/search/exports/{dataFormat}.

title: Export search results from a codelist concept — i14y_export_codelist_search
code: i14y_export_codelist_search(   id = NULL,   query = NULL,   language = "de",   filters = NULL,   format = "csv",   withAnnotations = FALSE )

title: Export search results from a codelist concept — i14y_export_codelist_search
text: id string. UUID codelist concept. query string. search query. `NULL`, entries returned (subject `filters`, `page` `pageSize`). language string. language response data ("de", "fr", "en", "", "rm"). Default "de". filters character vector. Optional filter expressions, passed API `filters` array parameter. format string. export format ("csv" "json"). withAnnotations logical. `TRUE`, annotations included.

title: Export search results from a codelist concept — i14y_export_codelist_search
text: tibble "csv", list "json". `NULL` offline.

what: Export the data structure of a dataset — i14y_get_dataset_structure
title: Export the data structure of a dataset — i14y_get_dataset_structure
text: Calls I14Y public API endpoint /datasets/{datasetId}/structures/exports/{dataFormat}. endpoint returns SHACL/RDF graph one supported linked-data formats. Note many datasets published structure return empty result.

title: Export the data structure of a dataset — i14y_get_dataset_structure
code: i14y_get_dataset_structure(id = NULL, format = "JsonLd")

title: Export the data structure of a dataset — i14y_get_dataset_structure
text: id string. UUID dataset. format string. export format. One "JsonLd" (default), "Ttl" "Rdf".

title: Export the data structure of a dataset — i14y_get_dataset_structure
text: `format = "JsonLd"`, parsed JSON-LD graph list.   formats, raw response body character string. `NULL`   offline.

title: Export the data structure of a dataset — i14y_get_dataset_structure

19 de, it, fr, Adressat der Rechnung. Werden die Kosten eines Falles durch mehrere Kostenträger getragen (z.B. bei KVG-Patienten durch Grundversicherung und Kanton oder bei Zusatzversicherten durch Grundversicherung, Kanton und Zusatzversicherung) ist pro Kostenträger je eine Zeile zu erfassen. \n\nEs ist dieselbe Granularität, wie die Zeilen auf den verschickten Rechnungen anzugeben. Wurde z.B. für einen grundversicherten Fall eine Fallpauschale sowie ein Zusatzentgelt abgerechnet und der Grundversicherung sowie dem Kanton in Rechnung gestellt, so sind vier Zeilen zu liefern (1.Pauschale an Kanton, 2.Zusatzentgelt an Kanton, 3.Pauschale an Versicherer, 4.Zusatzentgelt an Versicherer).\n\nANQ-Fallbeiträge sind nicht anzugeben., Destinatario della fattura. Se i costi di un caso sono coperti da più garanti (p. es. per i pazienti LAMal, dall'assicurazione di base e dal Cantone, o per i pazienti con assicurazione complementare, dall'assicurazione di base, dal Cantone e dall'assicurazione complementare), per ciascuno di questi va registrata una riga. \n\nLa rilevazione deve essere effettuata con la stessa granularità delle righe delle fatture inviate. Se, per esempio, per un caso con assicurazione di base sono conteggiati e fatturati all'assicurazione di base e al Cantone un forfait per caso e una remunerazione supplementare, devono essere registrate quattro righe (1. forfait Cantone, 2. remunerazione supplementare Cantone, 3. forfait assicuratore, 4. remunerazione supplementare assicuratore).\n\nI contributi per caso ANQ non vanno indicati., Destinataire de la facture. Si les coûts d'un cas sont payés par plusieurs unités finale d’imputation (par exemple, pour les patients LAMal, par l'assurance de base et le canton ou, pour les assurés complémentaires, par l'assurance de base, le canton et l'assurance complémentaire), il convient de saisir une ligne par payeur. \n\nIl faut indiquer la même granularité que les lignes sur les factures envoyées. Si, par exemple, un forfait par cas ainsi qu'une rémunération supplémentaire ont été facturés pour un cas couvert par l'assurance de base et facturés à l'assurance de base et au canton, quatre lignes doivent être fournies (1.forfait au canton, 2.rémunération supplémentaire au canton, 3.forfait à l'assureur, 4.rémunération supplémentaire à l'assureur).\n\nLes contributions ANQ par cas ne doivent pas être indiquées. #> 20                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          it, fr, de, Identificatore per distinguere in modo univoco le fatture di un caso. Deve essere univoco per ogni caso e ogni riga della fattura (ovvero non possono esserci due righe con lo stesso rech_id per lo stesso caso. È invece possibile che ci siano due righe con lo stesso rech_id per casi diversi)., Identificateur permettant de distinguer univoquement les factures d'un cas. Il doit être unique pour chaque cas et chaque ligne de facture (c'est-à-dire qu'il ne peut pas y avoir deux lignes avec le même rech_id pour un même cas. En revanche, cela est possible pour des cas différents)., Identifikator zur eindeutigen Unterscheidung der Einträge in der Rechnungstabelle. Diese muss eindeutig pro Fall und Rechnungszeile sein (d.h. es darf pro Fall nicht zwei Zeilen mit derselben rech_id geben. Bei verschiedenen Fällen hingegen schon). #> 21 19 de, it, fr, Adressat der Rechnung. Werden die Kosten eines Falles durch mehrere Kostenträger getragen (z.B. bei KVG-Patienten durch Grundversicherung und Kanton oder bei Zusatzversicherten durch Grundversicherung, Kanton und Zusatzversicherung) ist pro Kostenträger je eine Zeile zu erfassen. \n\nEs ist dieselbe Granularität, wie die Zeilen auf den verschickten Rechnungen anzugeben. Wurde z.B. für einen grundversicherten Fall eine Fallpauschale sowie ein Zusatzentgelt abgerechnet und der Grundversicherung sowie dem Kanton in Rechnung gestellt, so sind vier Zeilen zu liefern (1.Pauschale an Kanton, 2.Zusatzentgelt an Kanton, 3.Pauschale an Versicherer, 4.Zusatzentgelt an Versicherer).\n\nANQ-Fallbeiträge sind nicht anzugeben., Destinatario della fattura. Se i costi di un caso sono coperti da più garanti (p. es. per i pazienti LAMal, dall'assicurazione di base e dal Cantone, o per i pazienti con assicurazione complementare, dall'assicurazione di base, dal Cantone e dall'assicurazione complementare), per ciascuno di questi va registrata una riga. \n\nLa rilevazione deve essere effettuata con la stessa granularità delle righe delle fatture inviate. Se, per esempio, per un caso con assicurazione di base sono conteggiati e fatturati all'assicurazione di base e al Cantone un forfait per caso e una remunerazione supplementare, devono essere registrate quattro righe (1. forfait Cantone, 2. remunerazione supplementare Cantone, 3. forfait assicuratore, 4. remunerazione supplementare assicuratore).\n\nI contributi per caso ANQ non vanno indicati., Destinataire de la facture. Si les coûts d'un cas sont payés par plusieurs unités finale d’imputation (par exemple, pour les patients LAMal, par l'assurance de base et le canton ou, pour les assurés complémentaires, par l'assurance de base, le canton et l'assurance complémentaire), il convient de saisir une ligne par payeur. \n\nIl faut indiquer la même granularité que les lignes sur les factures envoyées. Si, par exemple, un forfait par cas ainsi qu'une rémunération supplémentaire ont été facturés pour un cas couvert par l'assurance de base et facturés à l'assurance de base et au canton, quatre lignes doivent être fournies (1.forfait au canton, 2.rémunération supplémentaire au canton, 3.forfait à l'assureur, 4.rémunération supplémentaire à l'assureur).\n\nLes contributions ANQ par cas ne doivent pas être indiquées. #> 20                                                                                                                                                                      it, fr, de, Identificatore per distinguere in modo univoco le fatture di un caso. Deve essere univoco per ogni caso e ogni riga della fattura (ovvero non possono esserci due righe con lo stesso rech_id per lo stesso caso. È invece possibile che ci siano due righe con lo stesso rech_id per casi diversi)., Identificateur permettant de distinguer univoquement les factures d'un cas. Il doit être unique pour chaque cas et chaque ligne de facture (c'est-à-dire qu'il ne peut pas y avoir deux lignes avec le même rech_id pour un même cas. En revanche, cela est possible pour des cas différents)., Identifikator zur eindeutigen Unterscheidung der Einträge in der Rechnungstabelle. Diese muss eindeutig pro Fall und Rechnungszeile sein (d.h. es darf pro Fall nicht zwei Zeilen mit derselben rech_id geben. Bei verschiedenen Fällen hingegen schon). #> 21 what: Get a mapping table by ID — i14y_get_mappingtable
title: Get a mapping table by ID — i14y_get_mappingtable
text: Calls I14Y public API endpoint /mappingtables/{mappingTableId}.

title: Get a mapping table by ID — i14y_get_mappingtable
code: i14y_get_mappingtable(id = NULL)

title: Get a mapping table by ID — i14y_get_mappingtable
text: id string. UUID mapping table.

title: Get a mapping table by ID — i14y_get_mappingtable
text: list mapping table metadata. `NULL` offline.

what: Export the relations of a mapping table — i14y_get_mappingtable_relations
title: Export the relations of a mapping table — i14y_get_mappingtable_relations
text: Calls I14Y public API endpoint /mappingtables/{mappingTableId}/relations/exports/{dataFormat}.

title: Export the relations of a mapping table — i14y_get_mappingtable_relations
code: i14y_get_mappingtable_relations(id = NULL, format = "Json")

title: Export the relations of a mapping table — i14y_get_mappingtable_relations
text: id string. UUID mapping table. format string. One "Json" (default), "Csv".

title: Export the relations of a mapping table — i14y_get_mappingtable_relations
text: `format = "Json"`, tibble relations (one row per   source/target/relationType triple). `format = "Csv"`, raw   CSV response body character string. `NULL` offline.

what: Get a public service by ID — i14y_get_publicservice
title: Get a public service by ID — i14y_get_publicservice
text: Calls I14Y public API endpoint /publicservices/{publicServiceId}.

title: Get a public service by ID — i14y_get_publicservice
code: i14y_get_publicservice(id = NULL)

title: Get a public service by ID — i14y_get_publicservice
text: id string. UUID public service.

title: Get a public service by ID — i14y_get_publicservice
text: list public service metadata. `NULL` offline.

title: List catalogs — i14y_list_catalogs
text: Calls I14Y public API endpoint /catalogs.

title: List catalogs — i14y_list_catalogs
code: i14y_list_catalogs(page = NULL, pageSize = NULL)

title: List catalogs — i14y_list_catalogs
text: page integer. result page return. pageSize integer. size result page.

title: List catalogs — i14y_list_catalogs
text: tibble catalog summaries. `NULL` offline.

title: List concepts — i14y_list_concepts
text: Calls I14Y public API endpoint /concepts.

title: List concepts — i14y_list_concepts

title: I14Y 0.2.0
text: BREAKING CHANGE: align package restructured I14Y API. upstream Nomenclatures, DataStructures ContentConfigurations endpoints removed; new data model multi-level “nomenclatures” split separate codelist concepts (e.g. NOGA now NOGA_SECTION, NOGA_DIVISION, NOGA_GROUP, NOGA_CLASS) structures exposed dataset UUID. BREAKING CHANGE: remove i14y_get_nomenclature_level() i14y_get_nomenclature_level_multiple(). Use i14y_search_concept() find relevant per-level codelist concept, i14y_get_codelist() download entries. BREAKING CHANGE: remove i14y_search_nomenclature(). Replaced i14y_search_codelist(id, query, language) calls /concepts/{conceptId}/codelist-entries/search public API. Takes concept UUID instead string nomenclature identifier. BREAKING CHANGE: rename i14y_get_data_structure() i14y_get_dataset_structure() match public API endpoint /datasets/{datasetId}/structures/exports/{format}. Argument identifier (string) replaced id (UUID), language replaced format (one “JsonLd”, “Ttl”, “Rdf”). endpoint returns SHACL/RDF graph rather tabular variables list. BREAKING CHANGE: rename i14y_get_content_information() i14y_get_dataset() match public API endpoint /datasets/{datasetId}. Argument identifier (string) replaced id (UUID). BREAKING CHANGE: remove i14y_get_dataset_metadata(). targeted internal input-backend host superseded i14y_get_dataset(), calls equivalent public API endpoint. BREAKING CHANGE: remove i14y_get_concept_all_versions(). targeted internal input-backend host public API exposes equivalent. //concepts/{id}/versions becomes available publicly, may reintroduced. BREAKING CHANGE: i14y_get_concept() now calls /concepts/{conceptId} public API. language argument removed (public endpoint always returns four languages, de/en/fr/). response unwrapped {data: ...} envelope; internal-fields (responsiblePerson, validTo, codeListId, …) longer returned, casing codelistEntryValueMaxLength becomes codeListEntryValueMaxLength. New generic search: i14y_search() exposes faceted public-API search resource types (Dataset, DataService, PublicService, Concept, MappingTable). i14y_search_catalog() i14y_search_concept() become thin wrappers around longer call undocumented input-backend host. New listing functions every catalog resource: i14y_list_catalogs(), i14y_list_datasets(), i14y_list_concepts(), i14y_list_dataservices(), i14y_list_publicservices(), i14y_list_mappingtables(). accept standard language, publishers, themes, registrationStatuses, page pageSize filters. New catalog endpoints: i14y_get_catalog(), i14y_get_catalog_records(), i14y_get_catalog_record() i14y_get_catalog_dcat() (RDF/TTL export). New mapping table endpoints: i14y_get_mappingtable() i14y_get_mappingtable_relations() (Json/Csv). New endpoints i14y_get_dataservice() i14y_get_publicservice() single-resource lookups. New i14y_get_concept_export() fetch full DCAT export concept. New i14y_export_codelist_search() download codelist search results CSV JSON, optional annotations. i14y_search_codelist() accepts NULL query (list-mode) filters argument, supports Rm (Romansh) language. i14y_get_codelist() gains withAnnotations; i14y_get_concept() gains includeCodeListEntries. Internal: exported functions now share single HTTP layer (i14y_request()) retry transient statuses, RFC 7807-aware error messages, consistent {data: ...} envelope unwrapping. New vignettes: “Getting started”, “Discovering catalog” “Codelists BFS”. Update README.Rmd reflect new model use UUIDs examples.

title: I14Y 0.1.5
text: CRAN release: 2025-07-14 new contributor added fixed tests pull request https://github.com/lgnbhl/I14Y/pull/1 Updated affected functions use new backend API base URL. Refactored i14y_search_concept() align new Catalog endpoint, added support filtering conceptValueTypes registrationStatuses. Added new function, i14y_get_dataset_metadata(), now retrieves dataset descriptions distributions, since handled unified endpoint updated API. BREAKING CHANGE: i14y_get_data_element() removed, endpoint seems removed API. Updated re-rendered README.Rmd reflect API changes function modifications.
